title: pimelea oreophila
intro: Pimelea oreophila is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae, commonly known as the mountain rice flower. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pimelea oreophila include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Pimelea oreophila can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve for topical application, making it a versatile herb for natural remedies.
